name: Jackson Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 14 oz can artichoke hearts, drained and chopped
1 14 oz can hearts of palm, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry bacon until crisp; drain well and crumble; set aside.
2. In a salad bowl, combine chopped artichoke hearts, hearts of palm, onions, and parsley.
3. Add garlic, lemon juice, oil, bleu cheese, salt, and pepper to the mixture and stir well.
4. Cover and refrigerate.
5. Wash and dry romaine lettuce; tear leaves into small pieces.
6. To serve, mix chilled ingredients with romaine lettuce and place on chilled salad plates.
